violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed using tobacco outside of designated area. -Bartender smoking behind the bar.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Uncovered trays of chicken in the walk in cooler.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. -No sign on the salad bar.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Vent hood unable to keep up. Staining the walls and ceiling.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Areas around the equipment needs cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean plates and bowls on the salad bar are not inverted or covered.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Designated prep sink was not provided or not used for food items requiring washing/soaking. -No food prep sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in back and wall around the dishwasher in need of repair.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Staining of the walls and ceiling.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Can smell cigarette smoke in the facility.
